emails.subject: Gas Logistics Presentation
emails.body: Gas Logistics Presentation Caroline Barnes has indicated that you have a presentation put together that briefly covers the purpose and function of Gas Logistics, and how this department interacts with other departments. I was wondering if you would be interested in making the presentation to GMS personnel to better understand how Measurement impacts your department. Please let me know if you have an interest and when you might be available and I'll arrange for the conference room to be available. Thanks- Gary

emails.subject: Re: Gas Logistics Presentation
emails.body: Re: Gas Logistics Presentation Gary, I would be glad to do A prensentation for your group. I am out of town until Fri. I'llcall you to set up a time. Thanks Lynn Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL> Sent: Tue Oct 23 13:13:54 2001

emails.subject: RE: Gas Logistics Presentation
emails.body: RE: Gas Logistics Presentation Gary, would one of the following dates and times work for you and your group? November 1 in the afternoon November 13 in the morning November 14 in the afternoon Please give me a call and let me know if any of these work. I am assuming you planning on 1 hour? Is that right? Thanks. Lynn
